data.name: Acadian Asset Management Inc.
data.description: Acadian Asset Management Inc. is a publicly owned asset management holding company. The firm provides its services to individuals and institutions. It manages separate client focused portfolios through its subsidiaries. The firm also launches equity mutual funds for its clients. It invests in public equity, fixed income, and alternative investment markets through its subsidiaries. The firm was fou...

data.name: Aurora Cannabis Inc.
data.description: Aurora Cannabis Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, distribution, and sale of cannabis products in Canada and internationally. The company offers pharmaceutical-grade cannabis products; and medical and consumer cannabis products. data.name: Abrdn Income Credit Strategies Fund
data.description: Abrdn Income Credit Strategies Fund is a closed-ended fixed income fund launched and managed by Aberdeen Asset Managers Limited. It is co-managed by Aberdeen Standard Investments Inc. The fund invests in fixed income markets across the globe. It seeks to invest primarily in loan and debt instruments.
